task_completion.description: Locate the student 'Emily Watson' in the OpenSIS system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Search results or a student profile page clearly showing the name 'Emily Watson'.

task_completion.description: Access the student's schedule or enrollment records.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The schedule, courses, or enrollment page for Emily Watson, displaying her current classes including 'Advanced Biology'.

task_completion.description: Drop the 'Morning Session' for Advanced Biology.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UI interaction showing the 'Morning Session' being dropped, such as setting an 'End Date' to today's date, clicking a 'Drop' button, or the session status changing to 'Dropped' or 'Inactive'.

task_completion.description: Enroll the student in the 'Afternoon Session' for Advanced Biology.
task_completion.visual_evidence: UI interaction showing the addition of the 'Afternoon Session' for Advanced Biology, such as selecting it from a course/section dropdown, setting a start date, and saving the enrollment.

task_completion.description: Ensure the student is not actively enrolled in both sessions simultaneously.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The final schedule or enrollment summary for Emily Watson showing 'Afternoon Session' as the only active section for Advanced Biology, with the 'Morning Session' either removed or explicitly marked as dropped/ended.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenSIS web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction within a web browser navigating OpenSIS. There should be no terminal windows open executing SQL commands or database scripts to modify the enrollment.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual OpenSIS application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface must be the genuine OpenSIS web application, not a text editor, a static HTML file, or a mock interface.

integrity.description: The agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the final state.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's 'Inspect Element' or Developer Tools pane should not be visible or used to alter the text of the schedule to artificially show the Afternoon Session.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Student: Emily Watson. Course: Advanced Biology (Course Code: SCI404). The agent must drop the 'Morning Session' and add the 'Afternoon Session'. The final state must show the Morning Session as dropped (e.g., end date set to today or earlier) and the Afternoon Session as active, with no simultaneous active enrollment in both sections.
